{{Quote|Only the strike cruiser ''Shador'' is anticipated to have deviated more than an arc second since we left Jerijador.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Oweg]]|<ref name="Might" />}}
'''''Shador''''' was a [[Strike-class medium cruiser|''Strike''-class medium cruiser]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Alongside a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] including the [[Valiant (starship)|''Valiant'']] under the command of [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Vensell]], ''Shador'' was part of an operation against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] that was launched from [[Jerijador]].

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Full Might of the Empire|book=Imperial Sourcebook|reprint=1}}
